name: Main
description: Canonical page composition owning gutter, measure, and vertical rhythm.

children.description: Page regions composed from Main.Header, Main.Description, Main.Content, and Main.Footer

measure.description: Maximum width applied to the page composition

as.description: Semantic HTML element rendered by the root

when: Composing a page header, description, content, and footer
guidelines: Use one Main gutter owner per page
Compose page regions with Main.Header, Main.Description, Main.Content, and Main.Footer
accessibility: Use the default main element unless an existing shell already owns the main landmark

examples.name: Full Measure
examples.description: Page composition that uses the full available canvas
examples.code:
<Main measure="full">
  <Main.Header>Page statement</Main.Header>
  <Main.Description>Supporting page context.</Main.Description>
  <Main.Content>Page content</Main.Content>
  <Main.Footer>Page actions</Main.Footer>
</Main>

examples.name: Narrow Measure
examples.description: Readable page composition constrained to the canonical 800px measure
examples.code:
<Main measure="narrow">
  <Main.Header>Settings</Main.Header>
  <Main.Description>Manage the workspace contract.</Main.Description>
  <Main.Content>Settings content</Main.Content>
  <Main.Footer>Save changes</Main.Footer>
</Main>
